propositions: Add a required-environment op-cert verification lane as a step in the existing identity merge-gate, reusing its merged-log walk and ENFORCE_SINCE grandfathering rather than a parallel walker.

A new CLI `rebar verify-opcert` walks the merged log grouped by ticket_id and verifies each in-scope ticket's DSSE op-cert via verify_required_environment, exiting 1 only when an enforced ticket lacks a valid op-cert.
The enforcement anchor for a ticket lacking a required-environment op-cert is the commit introducing its terminal close-STATUS event, resolved and tested against ENFORCE_SINCE.
A fixture test proves valid op-certs pass while missing op-certs and foreign-key-signed op-certs fail against a pinned trusted_environments.yaml.
The workflow includes a CI-trigger audit comment enumerating and classifying each on: trigger as INCLUDED or NO_FILTER, asserted by a test.
The story is blocked on keystone op-cert storage/producer primitive requiring a reducer change to store the DSSE envelope on ticket attestations.
